string.text: Find %s for Petrovich
You need to bring Petrovich some tools so he can upgrade his equipment.

You know, buddy, I'm actually a pretty good mechanic. I can fix weapons and armor, and I can even do some upgrades! Well, I would if I had the right tools. But where can you get those here? Maybe you can help me get some basic tools, huh?
I need a set of tools for heavy work. It should include tools and oils for working on weapons. If you can get it, I'd be really grateful, and maybe I'll even pay you!... Probably.
Great, dude! Oh, sorry, I don't have anything to pay you with. But I can give you a nice discount!
Find %s for Petrovich
You need to bring Petrovich a set of tools for delicate work. He needs a more complete set to perform more advanced upgrades on his equipment.
Hey, dude, if you agree to get me a more complete set, you'll get an even bigger discount. Help me out, buddy?
I need tools for delicate work. It should have everything I need. You'll be like a brother to me if you get it!

Wow, thanks, bro! Now I’m definitely going to get rich. Damn, I’m going to be successful! ...If, of course, I don’t miss this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
Find %s for Petrovich
You need to bring Petrovich %s. He needs a unique set of tools to do even more advanced equipment upgrades.
Hey, man, if you find something valuable, I’ll give you a discount!
I need tools for calibration. They should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you get them!

No way...! Damn, thanks, bro! Now I’m definitely going to get rich. Damn, I’m going to be successful! ...If, of course, I don’t miss this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
%s for Antibiotic
You need to find a medical kit and take it to the medic Antibiotic.
I need a good set of medical tools. I can patch up minor wounds quickly, but when it comes to more serious injuries, my scalpel just isn’t enough.
I need a good set of medical tools. I can patch up minor wounds quickly, but when it comes to more serious injuries, my scalpel just isn’t enough.
Thanks, friend! These tools will save many lives. Thanks again for bringing them.
